description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a form-fitting wetsuit that covers the entire body from neck to ankles and wrists. The wetsuit features a sleek, athletic design with contrasting panels along the sides, arms, and legs, emphasizing a streamlined silhouette. The suit appears to be made of a flexible, smooth material, likely neoprene, suitable for aquatic or sporting activities. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended and relaxed at the sides, hands open and fingers naturally splayed. The head is uncovered, revealing a clean-shaven scalp and neutral facial expression. The feet are also covered by the wetsuit, forming integrated booties for full-body coverage.
description: An adult male in a full-body, form-fitting wetsuit with integrated booties, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. The wetsuit has a sleek, athletic design with contrasting panels and a smooth, flexible appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full chest, face, and the wetsuit's main paneling, with arms slightly out and hands visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the contour of the wetsuit along the torso and legs, and the arm's relaxed position.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the wetsuit, the back of the head, and the symmetrical design of the suit's panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, the suit's side panel, and the arm's relaxed position.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body wetsuit with integrated booties, athletic and form-fitting style
